description: Regression fixture for the no_unresolved_state_refs scorer check. If the scorer ever regresses, this fixture catches it — the output references $no_such that's never defined, so the check should FAIL (and therefore this fixture is expected to NOT pass the no-dangling-refs check).

requirement.jira_summary: Trivial placeholder for the scorer's dangling-$var regression

expected.__comment__: This output DELIBERATELY contains an unresolved $no_such — the scorer's no_unresolved_state_refs check must FAIL for this fixture. The meta-test is: if you run `--filter unresolved_var_regression --mode dry`, the fixture must be reported as FAILED on exactly that one check.

test_cases.title: References a $var that was never set
